creator: diizzy@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 222144
Patch for nghttp2

Update nghttp2 to 1.43.0
Rearrange Makefile to follow Porters Handbook more closely

Compile and run-time tested on FreeBSD 13.0-ALPHA2 (amd64) (make, make check-plist)
Poudriere testport OK 12.2-RELEASE (amd64)
Poudriere testport OK 11.4-RELEASE (amd64)

Note: REINPLACE_CMD lines seems to be unnecessary according to stage-qa in Poudriere
